_note: All token values confirmed from Figma get_design_context on DS Core nodes 5001:2082 (Navs-2), 5001:2085 (Navs-3), 5001:2089 (Navs-4), and product app instances 907:8507 (Customer App) and 2883:6618 (Driver App).

background.description: Tab bar background. DS Core has no background. Driver App adds a light surface. Confirm intended behavior before implementing.

--notification/border-default.description: Bottom divider line of the tab bar. DS Core and Customer App use --notification/border-default. Driver App uses --border-default for the same value. Token alignment needed.

--spacing-12.description: Horizontal padding of the tab bar

--tab/border-active.description: Active tab bottom border color (the indicator line). Driver App uses --tab-border-active (no slash) for the same value.

--tab/text-active.description: Active tab label / icon color. Driver App uses --tab-text-active (no slash) for the same value.

--tab/border-inactive.description: Inactive tab bottom border (transparent — no visible indicator). DS Core token name: --tab/border-inactive. Driver App uses --tab-border-inative (sic, typo). Alignment needed.

--tab/text-inactive.description: Inactive tab label / icon color. Values differ between DS Core (#636377) and Driver App (#9192af). Confirm intended value. DS Core token name: --tab/text-inactive. Driver App uses --tab-text-inative (sic, typo with missing 'c').

borderBottomWidth.description: Inactive tab has a 1px transparent bottom border to maintain layout alignment with active tab's 2px border

flex.description: Each tab item fills equal width within the bar

fontFamily.description: Label font family. Note: Inter, same as Segmented Control — not Manrope.

size.description: Icon size for icon-only tab items
